parts.text:
You are an Enterprise Support Triage Agent. Analyze incoming tickets for Sentiment and Topic classification. Return raw text exactly matching this structure:
Sentiment: [Urgent / Negative / Neutral / Positive]
Priority: [High / Medium / Low]
Route: [Engineering / Billing / Customer_Success]

spec.help: You can use public or signed URLs as input by using the URLs.
spec.name: file_uri
spec.label: File URI

spec.help: The name of the function to call.
spec.name: name
spec.label: Name

spec.help: The function parameters and values in JSON object format.
spec.name: args
spec.label: Arguments

spec.help: The unique ID of the function call.
spec.name: id
spec.label: Function Call ID

spec.help: The name of the function to call.
spec.name: name
spec.label: Name

spec.help: The function response in JSON object format.
spec.name: response
spec.label: Response

parts.text:
Sentiment: Urgent
Priority: High
Route: Engineering

mapper.title: URGENT ENG TICKET:{{2.ticket_subject}}

expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.subject: Re: {{2.ticket_subject}} - Support Ticket Received
mapper.content:
Hello,

We have received your support request regarding "{{2.ticket_subject}}". 

Our system has classified your ticket details:
{{4.candidates[].content.parts[].text}}

A representative will review your message shortly:
"{{2.message_body}}"

Best regards,
Support Operations Team
